positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a group of anthropomorphic woodland creatures (deer, foxes, raccoons) joyfully playing amongst bioluminescent flora and glowing mushrooms. Emphasize clean, graphic silhouettes against a deep navy blue and emerald green gradient background. Use a whimsical, highly detailed cartoon aesthetic, reminiscent of modern storybook illustration, with bold linework and flat color blocking. The mood should be magical and cozy. Composition must be centered and suitable for textile printing, maintaining strong contrast between dark and light elements. Cinematic lighting, highly saturated yet earthy color palette, perfect for screen printing style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, noise, grainy, photorealistic, realistic photography, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, jpeg artifacts
